images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, radiating a cool and independent vibe while biting her lip slightly. She is dressed in a form-fitting, modern Cheongsam reimagined in a trendy style, featuring a sleek silk texture that hugs her slim waist and ample curves, with a high slit that accentuates her long legs. She stands confidently in the middle of a vibrant flower field, the colorful blooms creating a dreamy bokeh that blurs into the background under a bright, clear moonlight glow that illuminates her flawless skin texture, visible pores, and faint vellus hair. Shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, the image captures incredible depth of field, ray tracing details, and global illumination, rendered in a Kodak Portra 400 style with rich, film-like color grades.8k photo, Large breasts
